summary: Frontend-only verification completed on https://wc2026-nine-sepia.vercel.app for Home live summary enhancements. Runtime is stable and build passes, but live-only validations are blocked because no live matches were present during execution.

integration_issues.flow: Home live summary metrics + manual refresh
integration_issues.issue: Could not runtime-verify live summary card metric grid fields and manual-only refresh behavior because zero live matches were available on tested public URL at test time.
Could not runtime-verify link rendering contract because no live MatchCard was present on Home.

action_items: Run the same UI checks during an active live match window (or with controlled fixture data) to validate: metrics grid keys (corners, goal kicks, substitutions, yellow/red cards, half-time, full-time/live).
During live window, confirm no background events/stats polling occurs before clicking Refresh, then confirm refresh triggers events+stats requests.
During live window, verify MatchCard shows 'Open Live Summary' new-tab link and href format /match/{id}.
critical_code_review_comments: Code-level review matches requested implementation: Home LiveSummaryCard uses useMatchEvents/useMatchStats with enabled:false and intervalMs:false, and refresh is explicitly button-triggered via refetch.
Metrics row definitions in Home include all requested fields and dedicated test ids: corners, goal-kicks, subs, yellow, red, ht, ft.
MatchCard includes a live-only 'Open Live Summary' link with data-testid and new-tab attributes; runtime presence depends on live match availability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Playwright run on public preview loaded Home and basic nav without blocking errors. No live summary cards or live MatchCard links were rendered, so live-specific runtime assertions were skipped. Local yarn build succeeded with no compile/runtime regression from compact styling changes.
rca of the issue: Not a product bug reproduced in this run; this is a testability gap due to runtime data state (no live matches). Reproduction context: open Home on https://wc2026-nine-sepia.vercel.app at 2026-06-19 03:26 UTC and query [data-testid^='home-live-summary-'] => 0 cards. Mitigation: retest during live fixtures or inject deterministic live fixture data for e2e validation. MOCKED APIs: NONE.
